expectations.evidence: import ScanditCaptureCore and import ScanditIdCapture both present at top of file
Lazy var calls DataCaptureContext.initialize(licenseKey: "-- ENTER YOUR SCANDIT LICENSE KEY HERE --") then returns DataCaptureContext.shared
camera = Camera.default followed by context.setFrameSource(camera, completionHandler: nil)

expectations.text: Creates DataCaptureView(context:frame:) and adds it as a subview
expectations.evidence: captureView = DataCaptureView(context: context, frame: view.bounds) and view.addSubview(captureView)

expectations.text: Creates IdCaptureSettings() and sets acceptedDocuments to include Passport(region: .any), DriverLicense(region: .any), and IdCard(region: .any)

Sets settings.scanner = IdCaptureScanner(physicalDocument: FullDocumentScanner()) — uses FullDocumentScanner (both sides required), does NOT use SingleSideScanner, settings.supportedDocuments, or settings.scannerType
expectations.evidence: settings.scanner = IdCaptureScanner(physicalDocument: FullDocumentScanner()); no SingleSideScanner, supportedDocuments, or scannerType anywhere in file

expectations.text: Creates IdCapture(context: context, settings: settings) — does NOT use IdCapture.Create or IdCapture.forDataCaptureContext
Implements idCapture(_:didCapture:capturedId:) — does NOT use didCaptureIn session:frameData:
expectations.evidence: func idCapture(_ idCapture: IdCapture, didCapture capturedId: CapturedId) — correct modern signature

expectations.text: Implements idCapture(_:didReject:reason:) — does NOT use didRejectIn session:frameData:
expectations.evidence: func idCapture(_ idCapture: IdCapture, didReject capturedId: CapturedId?, reason: RejectionReason) — correct modern signature

expectations.text: Sets idCapture.isEnabled = false inside didCapture before showing the alert
expectations.evidence: idCapture.isEnabled = false is the first statement in didCapture(_:didCapture:capturedId:), before DispatchQueue.main.async alert presentation

expectations.text: Re-enables idCapture.isEnabled = true when the alert is dismissed
Dispatches UI work to DispatchQueue.main or the main thread
expectations.evidence: DispatchQueue.main.async used in both didCapture and didReject before presenting UIAlertController

expectations.text: Calls idCapture.addListener(self) once at setup time (e.g. in setupRecognition or viewDidLoad), NOT in viewWillAppear
expectations.evidence: idCapture.addListener(self) called in setupRecognition(), which is called from viewDidLoad(); not present in viewWillAppear

expectations.text: Turns camera on in viewWillAppear and off in viewDidDisappear
Reads capturedId.fullName, capturedId.dateOfBirth, and capturedId.documentNumber from the CapturedId
expectations.evidence: capturedId.fullName, capturedId.dateOfBirth, and capturedId.documentNumber all accessed in didCapture

expectations.text: Does NOT reference IdCaptureSession or FrameData
expectations.evidence: No mention of IdCaptureSession or FrameData anywhere in the file

expectations.text: Does NOT reference AamvaBarcodeVerifier or DataConsistencyVerifier
expectations.evidence: No mention of AamvaBarcodeVerifier or DataConsistencyVerifier anywhere in the file
